page.title: Settings
page.description: Manage your account, security, and preferences.

account.label: Account
account.headerSub: Manage your personal information and account data.

security.label: Security
security.headerSub: Protect your account with additional security measures.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.headerSub: Choose what Applo keeps you updated about and when.

preferences.label: Preferences
preferences.headerSub: Adjust Applo to your language, design, and privacy preferences.

profile.title: Profile information
profile.description: These details appear on your generated documents.
profile.emailLinked: Linked to your provider — the email address cannot be changed.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
delete.dialogDescription: This action cannot be undone. All your data, including profile, applications, and job postings, will be permanently deleted.
delete.emailConfirmLabel: Enter your email address to confirm
delete.oauthHint: You signed in with an external provider and have not set a password. Please enter your email address instead to confirm deletion.

toasts.emailConfirmRequired: Please enter your email address to confirm

password.title: Change password
password.description: Update your password regularly for better security
password.oauthDescription: Your account is linked to an external provider. There is no password set that you could change.
password.providerHint: Manage your password directly with your provider.

toasts.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
toasts.passwordChanged: Password changed successfully. Please sign in again.

email.title: Email notifications
email.description: Choose which emails you want to receive

applicationUpdates.title: Application updates
applicationUpdates.description: Status changes and reminders for your applications.

newJobPostings.title: New job postings
newJobPostings.description: Matching jobs as soon as they become available.

marketing.title: Product & newsletter
marketing.description: New features, tips, and occasional offers.

language.title: Language & region
language.description: Determines the language of the interface and generated documents.
language.label: Language

design.title: Design
design.description: Choose how Applo should look. “System” follows your device settings.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: You stay in control of your data.

publicProfile.title: Public profile
publicProfile.description: Your profile can be seen by others.

analytics.title: Anonymous usage data
analytics.description: Help us improve Applo. No personal content.

export.title: Export my data
export.description: Download all data we store about you as a JSON file (GDPR Art. 15 / 20).
export.error: Data export failed. Please try again.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.shortDescription: Manage your active sessions on different devices.
sessions.cardDescription: Manage your active sessions on different devices
sessions.loadErrorDescription: Active sessions could not be loaded
sessions.signOutAllDescription: You will be signed out from all {count, plural, one {# active session} other {# active sessions}}, including this device. You will need to sign in again on all devices.
sessions.description: Manage your active sessions on different devices. You can end access from any device at any time.
sessions.emptyDescription: This is your only active session. Sign in from another device to see more sessions here.

toasts.allRevoked: Signed out from {count, plural, one {# device} other {# devices}}
toasts.revokeAllError: Signing out from all devices failed

toasts.connected: Mailbox connected — Applo now detects incoming emails.

emailTracking.upgradeDescription: Connect your mailbox and Applo automatically detects company replies — interview invitations, confirmations, and rejections. Your application status updates live.
emailTracking.title: Automatic application tracking
emailTracking.description: Connect your mailbox. Applo automatically detects company replies (confirmations, invitations, rejections) and updates your application status.

notify.title: Email on automatic status change
notify.description: Applo only sends you an email when tracking changed the status — not when you change it yourself.

emailTracking.privacyNote: Applo reads emails only for classification. We store no email bodies — only sender, subject, and the classification result (see privacy).

connection.googleVerification: We are currently waiting for Google verification.
connection.disconnectDescription: Applo will no longer detect new emails from {email}. Existing applications remain, but the status will no longer update automatically.
